description: Composition Black sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neck, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and ribbed panels on the sides made of 97% cotton and 3% spandex and brand swoosh on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations A sportswear classic, this great sweatshirt from nike will form the backbone of your casual wardrobe and is a refreshing addition to your winter collection. The thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth, the stylish swoosh and ribbing on the sides gives you a strong sporty edge. Wear on its own or layer over long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
